item.title: DeepSeek V4 Released: 50% Cost Reduction in Reasoning
item.description: DeepSeek announced V4 today with significant improvements in reasoning efficiency and cost reduction compared to previous models.

item.title: OpenAI GPT-5 API Pricing Increases by 20%
item.description: OpenAI has updated its API pricing for GPT-5, raising rates by 20% citing increased infrastructure costs.

item.title: AI Startup Raises $500M Series B
item.description: An AI startup focused on enterprise automation has raised $500M in a Series B funding round.
